info.title: DeepDEX Backend API V2
info.description:
DeepDEX Decentralized Exchange Backend API - Version 2

## Error Codes

| Range | Category | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| 1xxx | Client Errors | Bad request, validation errors |
| 2xxx | Auth Errors | Authentication issues |
| 3xxx | Resource Errors | Not found, conflicts |
| 4xxx | Service Errors | Database, cache errors |
| 5xxx | Internal Errors | Server errors |

### Common Error Codes
- **1001** INVALID_PARAMETER - Invalid parameter value
- **1003** INVALID_ADDRESS - Invalid wallet address
- **3001** MARKET_NOT_FOUND - Market not found
- **3002** ORDER_NOT_FOUND - Order not found
- **4000** DATABASE_ERROR - Database error
- **5000** INTERNAL_ERROR - Server error

get.description:
Query funding fee history for one subaccount.

Request example:
`GET /v2/account/funding-fee?user=0xsubaccount&marketId=3&pageNumber=1&pageSize=20`

get.summary: Get funding fee history by wallet (all subaccounts)
get.description:
Query funding fee history by wallet, grouped by market/subaccount.

Request example:
`GET /v2/account/funding-fee-by-wallet?address=0xwallet&marketId=3&pageNumber=1&pageSize=20`

200.description: Funding fee records grouped by market then subaccount

get.description:
Get account margin ratio by address.

Request example:
`GET /v2/account/margin-ratio?address=0x980dda997141caa099752905d32f4a3fb980a4e3`

Request example:
`GET /v2/account/one-click-trading-accounts?address=0x980dda997141caa099752905d32f4a3fb980a4e3`

Request example:
`GET /v2/account/perp/history-orders?user=0xsubaccount&marketId=3&pageNumber=1&pageSize=20`

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order: ASC or DESC (default: DESC)

post.description:
Submit a signed EVM transaction to chain and parse order id from on-chain events.

Supported `marketType` values:
- `Perp`
- `Spot`

Supported `action` values:
- `PlaceOrder`
- `CancelOrder`
- `ClosePosition`

Supported combinations:
- `Perp + PlaceOrder`
- `Perp + CancelOrder`
- `Perp + ClosePosition`
- `Spot + PlaceOrder`
- `Spot + CancelOrder`

Not supported:
- `Spot + ClosePosition`

Request example:
`POST /v2/chain/tx/transact`

get.description:
Real-time data streaming via WebSocket.

**Endpoint**
- URL: `/v2/ws` (GET, upgrade to WebSocket)
- Protocol: JSON messages, utf-8

**Markets**
- Spot: `{"type":"spot","name":"ETH/USDC"}` or `{"type":"spot","pair":"0x..."}` (one of name/pair required)
- Perp: `{"type":"perp","id":1}` or `{"type":"perp","name":"ETH-USDC"}` (one of id/name required)
- All (aggregate): `{"type":"all"}` (supports `volume_stats` plus user portfolio channels)
- Lending (aggregate): `{"type":"lending"}` (supports `total_deposits` and `total_borrows`)

**Subscriptions**
- Simple channels: `orderbook`, `trades`, `price_change_1h`, `price_change_24h`, `volume_stats`, `latest_price`, `oracle_price`, `mark_price`, `funding_rate`, `avg_funding_rate_24h`, `funding_history`, `open_interest`, `long_short_ratio`, `total_deposits`, `total_borrows`
- Lending pool status: `lending_pool_status` (lending market only)
- Lending pool status by asset (case-insensitive):
  - `{"channel":"lending_pool_status","asset":"USDC"}`
- Asset-filtered totals (lending only, case-insensitive asset):
  - `{"channel":"total_deposits","asset":"USDC"}`
  - `{"channel":"total_borrows","asset":"usdc"}`
- User perp positions (perp only, address required):
  - `{"channel":"user_perp_positions","address":"0x...","status":"open|closed|all"}`
  - Legacy filter: `{"channel":"user_perp_positions","address":"0x...","onlyClosed":true}` (same as `status:"closed"`)
  - Wallet scope (expand to all subaccounts): `{"channel":"user_perp_positions","address":"0x...","addressType":"wallet"}`
- User perp open orders (perp only, address required):
  - `{"channel":"user_perp_open_orders","address":"0x..."}`
  - Wallet scope (expand to all subaccounts): `{"channel":"user_perp_open_orders","address":"0x...","addressType":"wallet"}`
- User perp order history (perp only, address required):
  - `{"channel":"user_perp_order_history","address":"0x..."}`
- User spot open orders (spot only, address required):
  - `{"channel":"user_spot_open_orders","address":"0x..."}`
  - Wallet scope (expand to all subaccounts): `{"channel":"user_spot_open_orders","address":"0x...","addressType":"wallet"}`
- User spot order history (spot only, address required):
  - `{"channel":"user_spot_order_history","address":"0x..."}`
- User perp trade history (perp only, address required):
  - `{"channel":"user_perp_trade_history","address":"0x..."}`
- User spot trade history (spot only, address required):
  - `{"channel":"user_spot_trade_history","address":"0x..."}`
- User incremental channels push behavior:
  - `user_perp_order_history`, `user_spot_open_orders`: incremental only (no snapshot/compensation)
  - `user_perp_trade_history`, `user_spot_trade_history`: incremental only (no snapshot/compensation), batched ~100ms
  - Use REST endpoints for full snapshot/history
- User balances (all only, address required):
  - `{"channel":"user_balances","address":"0x..."}`
- User total deposits/borrows (all only, address required):
  - `{"channel":"user_total_deposits","address":"0x..."}`
- User portfolio margin ratio (all only, address required):
  - `{"channel":"user_portfolio_margin_ratio","address":"0x..."}`
- User portfolio push interval:
  - batched every ~1s (only pushes on change; force push every ~30s)
- Candles channel: `{"time_frame": "1m|3m|5m|15m|30m|1h|2h|4h|8h|12h|1d|3d|1w|1M"}`
  - Server push uses `channel: "candles"` with `interval` field set to the time frame
- Options (optional): `orderbook_depth` (default 20), `orderbook_price_size` (default 0.01), `compress` (default true)

**Client → Server**
- Actions: `subscribe`, `multi_subscribe`, `batch_subscribe`, `unsubscribe`, `change_subscriptions`, `change_market`, `change_options`, `ping`
- Subscribe:
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "perp", "id": 1, "name": "ETH-USDC"},
  "subscriptions": ["orderbook", {"time_frame": "1m"}],
  "options": {"orderbook_depth": 40, "orderbook_price_size": 0.1, "compress": true}
}
```
- Subscribe (spot example):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "spot", "name": "ETH/USDC"},
  "subscriptions": ["latest_price", "price_change_1h", "price_change_24h", "volume_stats"]
}
```
- Subscribe (lending totals):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "lending"},
  "subscriptions": ["total_deposits", "total_borrows"]
}
```
- Subscribe (user portfolio):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "all"},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel":"user_balances","address":"0x..."},
    {"channel":"user_total_deposits","address":"0x..."},
    {"channel":"user_portfolio_margin_ratio","address":"0x..."}
  ]
}
```
- Server push (user_total_deposits example):
```json
{
  "channel": "user_total_deposits",
  "market": {"type": "all"},
  "data": {
    "address": "0x...",
    "totalDepositsUsd": 332.1,
    "totalBorrowsUsd": 0.0,
    "totalBorrowInterestUsd": 0.0
  }
}
```
- Subscribe (lending pool status):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "lending"},
  "subscriptions": ["lending_pool_status"]
}
```
- Subscribe (lending pool status filtered by asset):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "lending"},
  "subscriptions": [{"channel":"lending_pool_status","asset":"USDC"}]
}
```
- Subscribe (lending totals filtered by asset):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "lending"},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel": "total_deposits", "asset": "USDC"},
    {"channel": "total_borrows", "asset": "usdc"}
  ]
}
```
- Subscribe (user perp positions, status filter):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "perp", "id": 1},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel": "user_perp_positions", "address": "0x4a09a0bda255027759d131d2c15ea549f48d0c19", "status": "open"}
  ]
}
```
- Subscribe (wallet scope: all subaccounts for perp positions):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "perp", "id": 1},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel": "user_perp_positions", "address": "0x4a09a0bda255027759d131d2c15ea549f48d0c19", "addressType": "wallet"}
  ]
}
```
- Subscribe (user perp open orders):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "perp", "id": 1},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel": "user_perp_open_orders", "address": "0x4a09a0bda255027759d131d2c15ea549f48d0c19"}
  ]
}
```
- Subscribe (wallet scope: all subaccounts for user perp open orders):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "perp", "id": 1},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel": "user_perp_open_orders", "address": "0x4a09a0bda255027759d131d2c15ea549f48d0c19", "addressType": "wallet"}
  ]
}
```
- Subscribe (user perp order history):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "perp", "id": 1},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel": "user_perp_order_history", "address": "0x4a09a0bda255027759d131d2c15ea549f48d0c19"}
  ]
}
```
- Subscribe (user spot open orders):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "spot", "name": "ETH/USDC"},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel": "user_spot_open_orders", "address": "0x4a09a0bda255027759d131d2c15ea549f48d0c19"}
  ]
}
```
- Subscribe (wallet scope: all subaccounts for user spot open orders):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "spot", "name": "ETH/USDC"},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel": "user_spot_open_orders", "address": "0x4a09a0bda255027759d131d2c15ea549f48d0c19", "addressType": "wallet"}
  ]
}
```
- Subscribe (user spot order history):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "spot", "name": "ETH/USDC"},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel": "user_spot_order_history", "address": "0x4a09a0bda255027759d131d2c15ea549f48d0c19"}
  ]
}
```
- Subscribe (funding history):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "perp", "id": 1},
  "subscriptions": ["funding_history"]
}
```
- Subscribe (user perp trade history):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "perp", "id": 1},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel": "user_perp_trade_history", "address": "0x4a09a0bda255027759d131d2c15ea549f48d0c19"}
  ]
}
```
- Subscribe (user spot trade history):
```json
{
  "action": "subscribe",
  "market": {"type": "spot", "name": "ETH/USDC"},
  "subscriptions": [
    {"channel": "user_spot_trade_history", "address": "0x4a09a0bda255027759d131d2c15ea549f48d0c19"}
  ]
}
```
- Server push (user trade history incremental, batched ~100ms):
```json
{
  "type": "data",
  "channel": "user_perp_trade_history",
  "market": {"type": "perp", "id": 1},
  "data": {
    "address": "0x4a09a0bda255027759d131d2c15ea549f48d0c19",
    "trades": {
      "items": [
        {
          "marketId": 1,
          "orderId": 87561,
          "isLong": true,
          "taker": "Buyer",
          "price": 2209.76,
          "size": 0.01,
          "leverage": 10,
          "createdAt": "2026-02-06T14:52:25.613Z",
          "filledDirection": "Long",
          "fee": 0.02
        },
        {
          "marketId": 1,
          "orderId": 87562,
          "isLong": true,
          "taker": "Buyer",
          "price": 2210.12,
          "size": 0.02,
          "leverage": 10,
          "createdAt": "2026-02-06T14:52:25.713Z",
          "filledDirection": "Long",
          "fee": 0.04
        }
      ],
      "nextId": 1234567890,
      "hasNext": false
    }
  },
  "timestamp": 1738843945613
}
```
- Multi-subscribe:
```json
{
  "action": "multi_subscribe",
  "markets": [{"type": "perp", "id": 1}, {"type": "perp", "id": 2}],
  "subscriptions": ["trades", "latest_price"]
}
```
- Batch subscribe (per-market subscriptions):
```json
{
  "action": "batch_subscribe",
  "market_subscriptions": [
    {
      "market": {"type": "all"},
      "subscriptions": [
        {"channel":"user_balances","address":"0x..."},
        {"channel":"user_total_deposits","address":"0x..."}
      ]
    },
    {
      "market": {"type": "perp", "id": 1},
      "subscriptions": ["orderbook", "trades"]
    }
  ]
}
```
- Unsubscribe:
```json
{"action":"unsubscribe","market":{"type":"perp","id":1},"subscriptions":["trades"]}
```
- Change subscriptions (replace for market):
```json
{"action":"change_subscriptions","market":{"type":"perp","id":1},"subscriptions":["orderbook","trades"]}
```
- Change market (keeps current subs):
```json
{"action":"change_market","market":{"type":"spot","name":"ETH/USDC"}}
```
- Change options:
```json
{"action":"change_options","options":{"orderbook_depth":40,"orderbook_price_size":0.1,"compress":false}}
```
- Heartbeat: `{"action":"ping"}`

**Server → Client**
- Ack: `{"type":"subscribed","market":{...},"subscriptions":[...],"message":"ok"}`
- Ack (subs changed): `{"type":"subscriptions_changed","market":{...},"subscriptions":[...],"message":"ok"}`
- Ack (options changed): `{"type":"options_changed","options":{...},"message":"ok"}`
- Data push: `{"type":"data","channel":"orderbook","market":{...},"data":{...},"timestamp":1700000000}` (perp market includes `id`)
- Data push (lending totals):
```json
{
  "type": "data",
  "channel": "total_deposits",
  "market": {"type": "lending"},
  "data": {
    "total": 234.56,
    "items": [
      {"market_id": 1, "asset": "USDC", "value": 10.0},
      {"market_id": 2, "asset": "USDC", "value": 5.0}
    ]
  },
  "timestamp": 1700000000
}
```
- Data push (lending pool status):
```json
{
  "type": "data",
  "channel": "lending_pool_status",
  "market": {"type": "lending"},
  "data": {
    "items": [
      {
        "market_id": 1,
        "asset": "USDC",
        "total_supplied": 123.45,
        "supply_cap": 100.0,
        "supply_apr": 0.06,
        "initial_asset_weight": 0.5,
        "initial_borrow_weight": 0.7,
        "maintenance_asset_weight": 0.4,
        "maintenance_borrow_weight": 0.3,
        "total_borrowed": 12.34,
        "borrow_cap": 10.0,
        "borrow_apr": 0.08
      }
    ]
  },
  "timestamp": 1700000000
}
```
- Error: `{"type":"error","code":"INVALID_SUBSCRIPTION","message":"..." }`
- Heartbeat: `{"type":"pong","timestamp":1700000000}`

**Notes**
- One connection can manage multiple subscriptions for the selected market.
- Use `change_market` to switch market without reconnecting.
- Use `change_subscriptions` / `change_options` to update settings without reconnecting.
- Server replies to WebSocket-level ping/pong frames and to `ping` action with `pong`.

TransactParams.description: Transaction submission payload. `marketType` and `action` are case-sensitive enums.
